title: Historical Context and Contrarian View of the 7-Stage Pipeline
markdown:
# Introduction
The 7-stage pipeline has been a cornerstone of [computer architecture][1].
## History of Pipeline Development
The evolution of the 7-stage pipeline is a story of continuous improvement [2].
## Critique of the 7-Stage Pipeline
Despite its widespread adoption, the 7-stage pipeline has its drawbacks [3].
## Alternative Pipeline Architectures
Alternative designs have been proposed to address the limitations of the 7-stage pipeline [4].

sources.snippet: The 7-stage pipeline has undergone significant changes since its inception.
